name: motopass
description: MotoPass — Bitcoin Sovereign Passports & Residency Programs. Single source of truth project with pristine demo + modern dev environment.

scripts.deploy:verify: npm run build && echo 'Build OK — commit dist/ and push to origin main for Cloudflare Pages deploy'
scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=motopass --branch=main
scripts.deploy:safe: npm run build && echo 'Deploying ONLY to motopass (motopass.giveabit.io)' && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=motopass --branch=main
scripts.deploy:check: test -n "$CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN" && echo 'CF token set' || echo 'Set CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN in .env.local for manual wrangler deploy'
